name: @quoin/vocab-radix
description: Radix UI-flavoured accessibility primitives — toggle, switch, slider, progress bar, dialog overlay.

attribution.harvestNotes: Distills Radix UI's accessibility-first primitive set into Quoin semantic elements. Naming follows the role rather than Radix's component name (e.g. <accessible-toggle> instead of <Toggle.Root>). Use alongside the v1 vocab packs.
